Database management and synchronization for various data types including apps, contacts, health, notifications, pins, preferences, reminders, timeline items, watch app settings, and weather in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[api.c](api.c.md)**: Implements a BlobDB API for managing various database operations like insert, read, delete, and flush.
- **[api.h](api.h.md)**: Defines the BlobDB API for managing key/value stores on a watch, including functions for CRUD operations and synchronization.
- **[api_types.h](api_types.h.md)**: Defines the `BlobDBEventType` enum for database event types: Insert, Delete, and Flush.
- **[app_db.c](app_db.c.md)**: Manages application metadata storage and retrieval, including operations for app installation, deletion, and enumeration.
- **[app_db.h](app_db.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing application database entries in BlobDB.
- **[app_glance_db.c](app_glance_db.c.md)**: Implements the App Glance database for managing serialized app glance data, including functions for insertion, reading, validation, and deletion of glance entries.
- **[app_glance_db.h](app_glance_db.h.md)**: Functions for managing app glances in a database, including insert, read, delete, and initialization.
- **[app_glance_db_private.h](app_glance_db_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures and constants for serialized app glance headers and slices in Pebble firmware.
- **[contacts_db.c](contacts_db.c.md)**: Implements a contacts database with functions for insertion, retrieval, deletion, and serialization.
- **[contacts_db.h](contacts_db.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing serialized contact data in a database.
- **[endpoint.c](endpoint.c.md)**: Implements BlobDB endpoint handling for INSERT, DELETE, and CLEAR commands in a communication session.
- **[endpoint.h](endpoint.h.md)**: Functions for sending write, writeback, and sync completion messages for blob database items.
- **[endpoint2.c](endpoint2.c.md)**: Handles BlobDB communication by decoding messages, managing sessions, and sending responses for various commands.
- **[endpoint_private.c](endpoint_private.c.md)**: Functions for enabling message acceptance and reading tokens and database IDs in a blob database.
- **[endpoint_private.h](endpoint_private.h.md)**: Defines enums and functions for BlobDB command and response handling in the Pebble firmware.
- **[health_db.c](health_db.c.md)**: Manages health data storage and retrieval, including movement, sleep, and heart rate zone metrics.
- **[health_db.h](health_db.h.md)**: Functions for managing health metrics and typical values, including database operations for insertion, retrieval, and deletion.
- **[ios_notif_pref_db.c](ios_notif_pref_db.c.md)**: Manages iOS notification preferences in a database, including operations for storing, retrieving, and deleting preferences.
- **[ios_notif_pref_db.h](ios_notif_pref_db.h.md)**: Manages iOS notification preferences for Pebble firmware, including storage, retrieval, and updates.
- **[notif_db.c](notif_db.c.md)**: Manages notification database operations including insert, read, delete, and flush functions.
- **[notif_db.h](notif_db.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, inserting, reading, deleting, and flushing a notification database.
- **[pin_db.c](pin_db.c.md)**: Implements a database for managing timeline pins, including functions for insertion, deletion, and synchronization.
- **[pin_db.h](pin_db.h.md)**: Functions for managing timeline items in a database, including insert, delete, and status operations.
- **[prefs_db.c](prefs_db.c.md)**: Implements functions for initializing, inserting, reading, and managing preferences in a BlobDB.
- **[prefs_db.h](prefs_db.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, inserting, reading, deleting, and flushing a preferences database.
- **[reminder_db.c](reminder_db.c.md)**: Manages reminder data storage and synchronization, including insertion, deletion, and retrieval operations.
- **[reminder_db.h](reminder_db.h.md)**: Functions for managing timeline items in a reminder database, including read, write, delete, and search operations.
- **[sync.c](sync.c.md)**: Implements synchronization of BlobDB sessions, including session management and timeout handling.
- **[sync.h](sync.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for synchronizing BlobDB sessions in Pebble firmware.
- **[sync_util.c](sync_util.c.md)**: Functions for checking and building lists of dirty records in a settings file.
- **[sync_util.h](sync_util.h.md)**: Callbacks for checking and building lists of dirty records in settings files.
- **[timeline_item_storage.c](timeline_item_storage.c.md)**: Manages timeline item storage operations, including insertion, deletion, and retrieval with synchronization.
- **[timeline_item_storage.h](timeline_item_storage.h.md)**: Manages timeline item storage with functions for initialization, deletion, reading, and insertion.
- **[util.c](util.c.md)**: Function to free a list of dirty items in a blob database.
- **[util.h](util.h.md)**: Function to free a list of dirty items in a blob database.
- **[watch_app_prefs_db.c](watch_app_prefs_db.c.md)**: Manages watch app preferences with functions for reading, writing, and deleting settings.
- **[watch_app_prefs_db.h](watch_app_prefs_db.h.md)**: Functions for managing watch app preferences in a database, including read, write, and delete operations.
- **[weather_db.c](weather_db.c.md)**: Implements a weather database with functions for initialization, insertion, retrieval, and deletion of weather data entries.
- **[weather_db.h](weather_db.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing weather data entries in a blob database.
